# Functions to summarize drug results prioritized by multiple methods
## method-wise summarization

```{r}
library(here)
source(here("scripts/03_summarize_drugs_methodswise_functions.R"))
```

### RNAseq
```{r}
results <- summarize_significant_drugs(
  metadata_path = "data/v2/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info.tsv",
  signature_id = 1,
  score_method = "CMAP",
  score = "CMAP",
  stats = "median",
  score_percentile = 0.8,
  percent_reverse = NA,
  n = 3
)

# access the final result
results$significant_drugs
```

```{r}
# define input metadata and parameters
metadata_path <- "data/v2/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info.tsv"
all_signi_drugs_df <- create_drug_method_table(metadata_path, stats = "min", score_percentile = 0.9, n = 3)
all_signi_drugs_df
```

```{r}
methodwise_results = summarize_drugs_bymethods(all_signi_drugs_df, technology = "RNAseq", dirname = "results")
methodwise_results
```

### microarray
```{r}
results <- summarize_significant_drugs(
  metadata_path = "data/v2/signatures/microarray_TB_signature_run_info.tsv",
  signature_id = 1,
  score_method = "LINCS",
  score = "WCS",
  score_percentile = 0.9,
  percent_reverse = NA,
  n = 1
)

# access the final result
results$significant_drugs
```

```{r}
metadata_path <- "data/v2/signatures/microarray_TB_signature_run_info.tsv"
all_signi_drugs_df <- create_drug_method_table(metadata_path, score_percentile = 0.9, n = 5)
all_signi_drugs_df
```

```{r}
methodwise_results = summarize_drugs_bymethods(all_signi_drugs_df, technology = "microarray", dirname = "results")
methodwise_results 
```
